seoTitle: Kenmare vs Kennedy Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kenmare and Kennedy Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kenmare vs Kennedy Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kenmare and Kennedy Range.
heading: Kenmare vs Kennedy Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kenmare, Western Australia and Kennedy Range, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kennedy Range has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kenmare (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kenmare or Kennedy Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kenmare has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Kennedy Range scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kenmare scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Kennedy Range scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kenmare or Kennedy Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kennedy Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
